pages.text: $(italic)Jade$() is the small readout at the top of your screen that names whatever you point at. Look at a block and it tells you what the block is, what mod it came from, and — for machines, tanks, crops, and spawners — what it's $(italic)doing$(): how full, how grown, how powered.$(br2)Most of what you'll wonder about a strange block, Jade answers without a click.
pages.title: The Eye

pages.text: $(bold)Reading more.$() Jade shows the basics always; hold to reveal detail. Useful keys (rebindable):$(br)$(li)$(bold)`$() (grave/tilde) — toggle the overlay on and off.$(li)$(bold)=$() / $(bold)-$() — show the $(italic)recipes$() / $(italic)uses$() for what you're looking at, straight from EMI.$(li)$(bold)Backspace$() — expand the full details.$(br2)Crops show growth stage; spawners show their mob and whether they're active; Create kinetics show speed and stress. Point first, ask later.
pages.title: Reading More
